meta.name: NervRest V3 — Lunar Observatory
meta.description: Nervous system monitoring iOS app with moon mascot Luna. Dark dusk-purple theme, ember accents, conversational AI companion. Evolved from V2 Dusk using research from Oura, WHOOP, Calm, Variant community patterns.
source_references: Figma V2 Dusk team designs (Shield flow + In-App Luna greeting)

primary.role: Deep dusk purple — main background, canvas

secondary.role: Dusk 300 — card borders, calm arousal, active states

accent.role: Ember orange — primary CTA, alerts, arousal visualization

neutral.usage: 6-level dusk elevation system — each step adds ~5% white overlay equivalent on purple base

color.contrast_strategy: Dusk lavender text (#CFBEDB) on deep purple backgrounds. Ember accent used sparingly — max 2 accent colors visible simultaneously. Colored shadows (dusk-tinted, not black).

typography.font_style_notes: SF Pro throughout — clean, Apple-native. .default design (NOT .rounded) for all text. Exception: numeric scores use .rounded design for friendly data readability. 5.3:1 ratio between hero score (56pt) and labels (11pt) creates Oura-level typographic drama.

spacing.section_rhythm: Variable rhythm: 12pt tight (within groups), 24pt normal (related items), 40pt breathe (between sections), 56pt dramatic (before hero elements). NOT uniform grid.

shape.border_usage: 0.5px gradient strokes — brighter at top (white 15%), fading to near-invisible at bottom (white 3%). Simulates overhead lighting.
shape.divider_style: None — use spacing and surface elevation to separate sections

elevation.shadow_style: Colored tinted shadows — dusk purple (#402959) for neutral cards, ember (#D35200) for active/CTA states. Never pure black.
elevation.depth_cues: Glass material (.ultraThinMaterial), multi-layer radial gradients, top-light gradient borders, 6-level surface elevation scale

iconography.style: SF Symbols — outlined/filled depending on state

motion.easing: Spring (response: 0.6, dampingFraction: 0.7) for entrances. EaseInOut for state changes.
motion.entrance_pattern: Staggered reveal — each element delayed 0.1s, spring from 0.8 scale + 20pt y-offset
motion.philosophy: Cinematic but restrained. Breathing glow loops (4s easeInOut) on hero elements. Never gratuitous bouncing.

components.button_style: Full-width rounded rect (16pt radius), ember fill for primary, outlined for secondary. Colored shadow matching fill.
components.input_style: Rounded rect (16pt radius), dusk card fill, 0.5px border that changes to accent on focus. SF Pro text.
components.card_style: Mixed: glassmorphism (.ultraThinMaterial) for biometric data, gradient fill (cardBackground → 60% opacity) for suggestions, edge-accented (4px left bar) for actionable items.
components.navigation_pattern: NavigationStack with push transitions. Back button is custom circle.
components.modal_style: Full-screen cinematic overlay with curtain-drop animation
components.list_style: Stacked cards with staggered entrance animation
components.component_notes: Card variety is critical — never use the same card style for everything. Hero gauge sits directly on gradient background with NO card wrapper.

aesthetic.visual_metaphor: Observatory at night — watching over your nervous system like astronomers watch the sky. Luna (moon mascot) is the gentle guardian.
aesthetic.era_influence: 2025-2026 premium health tech — Oura/WHOOP data density meets Calm app warmth
aesthetic.genre: Premium health companion — between clinical biometric dashboard and cozy wellness app

visual_language.ornamentation: subtle accents — glowing halos around moon mascot, gradient arc on gauge, breathing radial glow
visual_language.whitespace_usage: Generous in hero area (56pt before gauge), compressed in data cards. Creates breathing rhythm.
visual_language.visual_weight_distribution: Top-heavy — mascot + gauge dominate upper 60%, data + actions in lower 40%
visual_language.focal_strategy: Single hero element (arousal gauge) with Luna mascot as emotional anchor above it
visual_language.contrast_level: High typographic contrast (56pt score vs 11pt labels). Low surface contrast (subtle elevation steps between dusk purples).
visual_language.texture_usage: 3% noise overlay on deep background for tactile warmth. Glass material blur on data cards.

composition.hierarchy_method: Scale contrast + spatial isolation. Hero score is 56pt isolated in gauge ring. Everything else is significantly smaller.
composition.balance_type: Radial — gauge and mascot centered, biometric pills balanced horizontally
composition.flow_direction: Top-to-bottom: mascot → status → gauge → data → action
composition.grouping_strategy: Proximity + shared container. Related metrics share a card. Unrelated sections separated by 40pt+ gap.
composition.negative_space_role: Primary tool for hierarchy. Hero area breathes. Data area is dense. Contrast between them creates drama.

imagery.illustration_style: Kawaii moon character (Luna) — 7 phases from full to new moon. Warm cream/dark navy duotone. Subtle glow halo.
imagery.graphic_elements: Circular gauge arc with angular gradient, radial glow backgrounds, pill-shaped badges
imagery.pattern_usage: None — rely on color and spacing, not patterns
imagery.image_shape: Circular — mascot clipped to circle, gauge is circular, biometric pills are capsule

interaction_feel.feedback_style: Haptic on arousal threshold crossings. Visual glow intensifies with arousal level.
interaction_feel.transition_personality: Spring entrances (bouncy but damped), cinematic overlays (curtain drop + staggered reveal)
interaction_feel.loading_style: Centered Luna mascot with breathing glow
interaction_feel.microinteraction_density: Medium — heart icon pulses when HR elevated, gauge arc animates on score change, breathing glow loops on hero

brand_voice_in_ui.tone: Gentle but direct. 'Your body isn't resting' — not aggressive, just factual and caring.
brand_voice_in_ui.formality: Informal but knowledgeable. First-person-plural ('Let's wind down').
brand_voice_in_ui.cta_style: Friendly invitation — 'Show me alternatives', 'Chat with Luna'
brand_voice_in_ui.empty_state_approach: Luna greeting — 'Good Evening, CC. How can I help you tonight?'
brand_voice_in_ui.error_tone: Empathetic — explain what happened, suggest what to do, never blame

overview.fallback_strategy: All effects are native SwiftUI — no fallback needed

background_effects.description: 3-layer background: (1) warm ambient glow top-right from Accent.glow at 4%, (2) arousal-driven status color radial at center at 10%, (3) linear purple wash fading to bottom. Arousal glow intensifies 3%→15% as score rises.

particle_systems.description: No particles — would distract from biometric data focus

3d_elements.description: No 3D — keep lightweight for always-on health monitoring

scroll_triggered_animations.animation_type: Staggered spring entrance — scale from 0.8 + offset y 20pt, 0.1s delay per element

text_effects.description: Arousal score animates numerically (counts up/down) rather than snapping. Uses .contentTransition(.numericText)

image_effects.description: Luna moon mascot has radial gradient glow behind it. Glow color changes with mood: warm peach (#F8C8A3) for happy/relieved, ember (#D35200) for concerned, deep ember (#842B00) for worried.

params.border_treatment: Top-light gradient stroke: white 15% at top → white 3% at bottom, 0.5px lineWidth

svg_animations.description: Luna moon mascot SVGs transition between phases (full→waning→crescent→new) based on arousal level. Crossfade transition.

params.animation_method: SwiftUI Image swap with opacity transition

visual_effects.composite_notes: V3 key upgrades from V2: (1) Add 3% noise texture overlay on background for tactile warmth — eliminates 'digital void' feel. (2) Top-light gradient borders on all cards instead of uniform white stroke. (3) Colored dusk-tinted shadows instead of black. (4) Arousal-driven background glow that intensifies from 3% to 15% as score rises — ambient state awareness. (5) Conversational home screen with Luna greeting + chat input, per Figma team direction. (6) Variable elevation system using 6-level dusk-purple scale.
